name: @intentsolutionsio/neurodivergent-visual-org
description: Create ADHD-friendly visual organizational tools (Mermaid diagrams) optimized for neurodivergent thinking patterns with accessibility modes

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install neurodivergent-visual-org\\n  or /plugin install neurodivergent-visual-org@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
